S.FORM: Richard E. Atha (Dick Atha) sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1931, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 9, Richard Atha, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
